statement: garak and promptfoo are model/app red-team evaluators (they probe a live model and can fail a CI build on regression), not static gates over the agent-artefact source files themselves.

evidence.quote: Probes a deployed LLM endpoint for prompt injection, jailbreaks... evaluates model responses (dynamic probing of a live model).

falsifier: If garak/promptfoo added a static SKILL.md content linter, the distinction would collapse.
